finding_results.notes: Compressed the registrar beat into a single embodied consequence block and replaced the old briefing chain with a live conflict beat (Nora call) before the transport decision. Each retained exchange now ends in a binding choice for Eli (discharge, payment terms, shuttle selection).

Rendered a real-time Nora phone call in-scene with visible pain-limited speech, interruption/static, and explicit family boundary language. The call ends without emotional tidy-up (hard directive + hang-up).
Replaced the billing-shock line that used the recurring landed-impact formula with fresh somatic cognition tied to breath/spasm response.

summary: Addressed all packet findings by restructuring the post-crash middle section to remove briefing drift, introducing an on-page pressured family call with unresolved boundary enforcement, and replacing the repeated landed-impact billing formula with embodied shock language.
